title: Centrifuge Imbalance Error Handling
content: When the clinic's centrifuge displays 'Imbalance Error (E-04)', do not force the lid open. Power cycle the device and ensure tube weights are distributed symmetrically with no more than 0.5g deviation. If the error persists after power cycling, escalate to BioMed engineering immediately to prevent motor damage.

title: Vital Signs Monitor Battery Failure
content: If the mobile vital signs monitor fails to hold a charge despite being on the dock all night, check the dock's indicator light. If green, the battery pack has failed and must be replaced using spares from Supply Room B. Do not use the device on wall power for patient transport.

title: Autoclave Pressure Verification Failure
content: If the daily autoclave indicator strip fails to change color completely, the load is not sterile. Abort usage of all instruments in that load. Run a biological indicator test cycle. If that fails, label device 'DO NOT USE' and escalate to Facilities Management.
